en.commentary:
I rank sunscreen on one ruthless principle: the best SPF is the one you will actually reapply every two hours, which means cosmetic feel matters as much as the protection number. That is why the EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 takes the top spot for the third year running. It is the sunscreen dermatologists put on their own faces, and the reason is the niacinamide. It calms redness and rosacea while a 9% zinc oxide base protects, so sensitive and acne-prone skin gets a treatment and a shield in one weightless layer. At $45 it is not cheap, but it is the bottle people finish and rebuy.

For anyone serious about sun damage, the ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica at number two is the upgrade. It is a 100% mineral SPF 50+ that folds in DNA-repair enzymes, which is why it shows up in dermatology offices that treat actinic keratosis. The La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-in Milk at number three is my outdoor answer. Eighty-minute water resistance and independent lab results that meet or beat the label make it the bottle I pack for a beach day or a long hike.

The middle of this ranking is where value lives. The Beauty of Joseon Daily Relief at $18 delivers a dewy, no-white-cast daily SPF that genuinely competes with bottles three times its price, and the CeraVe Hydrating Mineral at $16 is the drugstore pick for dry skin that needs ceramides with its protection. Supergoop Unseen earns its spot purely on finish: it vanishes and grips makeup like a primer. If you have deep skin and you are tired of gray cast, Black Girl Sunscreen is the answer that dries genuinely clear. And the Neutrogena Ultra Sheer SPF 70 at $11 is the body sunscreen I tell people to buy in bulk, because the only sunscreen that protects you is the one you apply generously and often.

highlights.title: EltaMD UV Clear is the rare sunscreen that treats your skin while it protects it
highlights.body: The reason dermatologists reach for UV Clear over flashier brands comes down to the niacinamide. At a 9% zinc oxide base it delivers broad-spectrum mineral protection, and the niacinamide actively reduces redness and calms the inflammation behind rosacea and acne. That makes it a genuine two-in-one: you get a daily anti-inflammatory treatment and broad-spectrum SPF in a single oil-free layer that never clogs pores. For anyone whose skin reacts to everything, this is the bottle that ends the search.

highlights.title: ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica is the pick if you are fighting existing sun damage
highlights.body: Most sunscreens prevent new damage and stop there. Eryfotona Actinica adds photolyase, a DNA-repair enzyme that targets damage already in the skin, which is exactly why it appears in dermatology clinics treating actinic keratosis and precancerous spots. Combined with a 100% mineral SPF 50+ filter and antioxidants, it functions as a daily reverse-and-protect step. At $55 it is the most clinical bottle on this list, and for anyone with a history of sun exposure it earns the premium.

highlights.title: La Roche-Posay Anthelios is the outdoor benchmark for one simple reason: it holds up
highlights.body: Beach days and long hikes punish sunscreen with sweat, water, and hours of direct exposure. The Anthelios Melt-in Milk answers with 80-minute water resistance and a track record of meeting or exceeding its SPF 60 label in independent third-party testing, which is rarer than it should be. The melt-in milk texture spreads fast over large areas of skin without the greasy drag most high-SPF body formulas leave behind. This is the bottle I trust when reapplication is inconvenient and the stakes are a real burn.

highlights.title: Beauty of Joseon proves the best daily SPF can cost less than lunch
highlights.body: At $18, the Daily Relief should not perform the way it does. The rice extract and probiotic formula sinks in fast, leaves a dewy rather than greasy finish, and dries down with zero white cast across every skin tone tested. It wears beautifully under makeup and feels like skincare rather than a chore. For a daily city sunscreen worn on a commute or at a desk, it competes directly with bottles costing three times more, and that is why it has become the K-beauty SPF everyone recommends.

highlights.title: Black Girl Sunscreen and Neutrogena Ultra Sheer solve the two problems that make people skip SPF
highlights.body: People skip sunscreen for two reasons: it leaves a gray cast on deep skin, or buying enough to apply generously feels wasteful. Black Girl Sunscreen fixes the first, drying genuinely clear on deep skin tones with avocado and jojoba keeping skin moisturized, plus 80-minute water resistance. The Neutrogena Ultra Sheer SPF 70 fixes the second at $11, which is cheap enough to apply the full recommended amount to your whole body and reapply without flinching. The most protective sunscreen is the one you use without rationing, and these two remove the excuses.

zh-tw.commentary:
我評防曬只認一個殘酷的原則：最好的防曬是你真的願意每兩小時補一次的那支，所以膚感跟防護係數一樣重要，再高的 SPF 你擦一次就嫌黏不想補也是白搭。這就是為什麼 EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 連續第三年坐穩第一。這支是皮膚科醫師會擦在自己臉上的防曬，關鍵在菸鹼醯胺，它一邊鎮定泛紅和酒糟，9% 氧化鋅一邊防曬，敏感肌和痘痘肌等於一層搞定保養加防護，質地又輕。一條約台幣 1,400 不算便宜，但這是大家會擦完再回購的那種。

認真想處理曬傷的人，第二名 ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica 是升級選擇。100% 物理 SPF 50+ 還加了 DNA 修復酵素，所以它常出現在處理日光性角化症的皮膚科診所。第三名 La Roche-Posay 安得利乳液是我的戶外答案，80 分鐘抗水，第三方實驗室實測防護力達標甚至超標，去海邊或爬山一整天我就帶這支。

排名中段是 CP 值的天下。Beauty of Joseon 每日防曬一條不到六百塊，水潤不泛白，實力直接打趴三倍價的產品。CeraVe 物理防曬約五百塊，乾肌想要防曬同時補神經醯胺選它。Supergoop Unseen 純靠膚感上榜，上臉隱形又抓妝。深膚色受夠泛白的話，Black Girl Sunscreen 是真的收乾不灰白的解答。露得清 Ultra Sheer SPF 70 約三百五，身體防曬我都叫人整罐囤，因為唯一有效的防曬是你捨得擦好擦滿、又願意一直補的那支。

highlights.title: EltaMD UV Clear 是少數擦了同時在保養皮膚的防曬
highlights.body: 皮膚科醫師願意拿 UV Clear 而不是那些行銷更兇的牌子，關鍵就在菸鹼醯胺。9% 氧化鋅打底給你廣譜物理防護，菸鹼醯胺則主動降低泛紅、鎮定酒糟和痘痘背後的發炎。等於一層無油配方裡同時有每日抗發炎保養加廣譜防曬，又不會塞毛孔。皮膚動不動就過敏的人，這條就是讓你停止找防曬的終點。

highlights.title: 已經有曬斑的人就選 ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica
highlights.body: 多數防曬只能預防新的傷害然後就沒了。Eryfotona Actinica 多加了光解酶這種 DNA 修復酵素，針對皮膚裡已經存在的損傷，這正是它出現在處理日光性角化症和癌前病變診所的原因。搭配 100% 物理 SPF 50+ 濾劑和抗氧化成分，它等於每天一道修復加防護的步驟。一條約台幣 1,700 是這份榜單最有臨床感的一支，有長期曬太陽史的人，這個溢價付得值得。

highlights.title: La Roche-Posay 安得利是戶外標竿，理由很簡單：它撐得住
highlights.body: 去海邊、長時間爬山，汗水加陽光直曬好幾個小時最考驗防曬。安得利乳液給你 80 分鐘抗水，加上在第三方獨立實測中防護力穩定達到甚至超過 SPF 60 標示，這比你想像中還少見。乳液質地在大面積肌膚上推得快又均勻，沒有多數高係數身體防曬那種油膩拖感。補擦不方便、又賭不起真的曬傷時，我信任這一條。

highlights.title: Beauty of Joseon 證明最好的日常防曬可以比一個便當還便宜
highlights.body: 一條不到六百塊，每日防曬不該有這種表現。米萃取加益生菌配方吸收快，收乾後是水潤而不是油膩，所有膚色實測都零泛白。上妝前打底很服貼，擦起來像保養而不像例行公事。當作通勤或上班整天戴的城市日常防曬，它直接跟三倍價的產品正面對決，這就是它變成大家都在推的韓系防曬的原因。

highlights.title: Black Girl Sunscreen 和露得清 Ultra Sheer 解決了大家不擦防曬的兩個理由
highlights.body: 大家不擦防曬通常兩個理由：深膚色會泛灰白，或是要買到擦得夠多會覺得太傷本。Black Girl Sunscreen 解決第一個，深膚色上臉真的收乾不灰白，酪梨和荷荷芭油還幫忙保濕，加上 80 分鐘抗水。露得清 Ultra Sheer SPF 70 用約三百五解決第二個，便宜到你願意全身擦滿建議用量、補擦也不手軟。防護力最強的防曬，就是那支你不用省著用的，這兩支把藉口都拿掉了。

references.title: The Best Sunscreens For 2026, According To Dermatologists
The best sunscreens of 2026, according to dermatologists and our own testing

en.commentary: EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 keeps the number one spot because it solves the single biggest reason people skip sunscreen: it does not clog pores or trigger breakouts. Dermatologists have called it the dermatologist's darling for decades, and it earns that by pairing reliable broad-spectrum UVA and UVB protection with niacinamide that calms acne-prone and sensitive skin. For a daily face sunscreen you will actually reapply, this is still the one to beat. ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica SPF 50 holds second on the strength of its DNA Repairsomes technology, which dermatologists specifically recommend for skin with existing sun damage. It is lightweight, suits all skin types, and folds vitamin E in to fight UVA damage, so it is the pick for anyone focused on repair as much as prevention. La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-in Milk SPF 60 sits third and remains the best body sunscreen for high-protection, water-resistant coverage. Its 2026 formula carries the Mexoryl 400 filter, a real breakthrough that targets the ultra-long UVA rays from 380 to 400nm responsible for most photoaging, and it holds the Skin Cancer Foundation Seal. The expert consensus this week has not shifted: SPF 30 minimum every day, SPF 50 plus for extended sun. Choose the EltaMD for sensitive, acne-prone faces, the ISDIN if you have sun damage to repair, and the La Roche-Posay for serious all-day body protection. No ranks moved this week.

highlights.title: EltaMD UV Clear is the best for sensitive, acne-prone skin
highlights.body: It delivers reliable broad-spectrum protection without clogging pores, and its niacinamide calms breakouts. Dermatologists have championed it for decades, and it remains the daily face sunscreen to beat.

highlights.title: ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica targets existing sun damage
highlights.body: Its DNA Repairsomes and vitamin E actively fight UVA damage, which is why dermatologists recommend it for skin with known sun damage. It is lightweight and suits every skin type.

highlights.title: La Roche-Posay Anthelios is the best body protection
highlights.body: Its 2026 formula adds the Mexoryl 400 filter that blocks the ultra-long UVA rays behind most photoaging, and it holds the Skin Cancer Foundation Seal. For water-resistant all-day coverage, it leads.

highlights.title: Daily SPF is the rule, 50 plus for long sun
highlights.body: Experts agree on SPF 30 minimum every day regardless of weather, and SPF 50 plus for extended time outdoors. The top picks here all clear that bar with broad-spectrum protection.

zh-tw.commentary: EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 繼續坐第一，因為它解決了大家不擦防曬最大的那個原因，它不會塞毛孔、也不會悶痘。皮膚科醫師幾十年來都叫它皮膚科醫師的最愛，靠的就是可靠的廣譜 UVA 跟 UVB 防護，加上能安撫易長痘跟敏感肌的菸鹼醯胺。要找一條你真的願意天天補擦的臉部防曬，它還是最難超越的。ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica SPF 50 守住第二，靠的是它的 DNA 修復酵素技術，皮膚科醫師特別推薦給已經有曬傷曬老的肌膚。它質地很輕，適合所有膚質，還加了維他命 E 對抗 UVA 傷害，所以它是那種預防之外更重視修復的人的首選。La Roche-Posay Anthelios 牛奶質地 SPF 60 排第三，依舊是高防護、抗水身體防曬的最佳選擇。它 2026 年的配方搭載 Mexoryl 400 濾劑，這是真正的突破，專門對付 380 到 400nm 那段造成多數光老化的超長波 UVA，還拿到美國皮膚癌基金會認證。這週專家共識沒變，每天至少 SPF 30，長時間曬太陽就 SPF 50 以上。敏感易痘臉就選 EltaMD，要修復曬傷就 ISDIN，要認真的全天身體防護就 La Roche-Posay。這週排名沒動。

highlights.title: EltaMD UV Clear 最適合敏感易痘肌
highlights.body: 它提供可靠的廣譜防護又不塞毛孔，菸鹼醯胺還能安撫痘痘。皮膚科醫師力挺它幾十年，它依舊是最難超越的天天臉部防曬。

highlights.title: ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica 針對已有曬傷
highlights.body: 它的 DNA 修復酵素跟維他命 E 主動對抗 UVA 傷害，所以皮膚科醫師推薦給已有曬傷曬老的肌膚。質地很輕，適合每一種膚質。

highlights.title: La Roche-Posay Anthelios 身體防護最強
highlights.body: 它 2026 年配方加入 Mexoryl 400 濾劑，擋下造成多數光老化的超長波 UVA，還拿到皮膚癌基金會認證。要抗水又能撐一整天，它領先。

highlights.title: 每天防曬是基本，長曬就 50 以上

zh-tw.commentary: 夏天最毒的太陽來了,這週防曬選什麼是真的有差,所以我的思路更偏向 UVA 抗老防護,雖然排序維持不動。EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 守住我的第一,它是少見那種一邊防曬一邊鎮定皮膚的物理配方。那 9% 的透明氧化鋅像鏡子一樣把紫外線反射掉,卻不泛白,對玫瑰痤瘡或敏感肌,沒有別的比得上。它就是我會閉眼推薦的每日基本款。ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica SPF 50 守第二,靠的是 DNA 修復酵素跟超輕薄的膚感,任何膚色擦了都消失。La Roche-Posay Anthelios 安得利清爽防曬乳 SPF 60 守第三,搭配 2026 的 Mexoryl 400 濾劑,專打導致八成肌膚老化的超長波 UVA,所以我把它的防護分數往上點一格。要去海邊待一整天,或是流汗爬山,這就是我最信任的身體防曬。往下看,Beauty of Joseon 朝鮮美人還是我的 CP 值之選,用零錢價給你超美的膚感。我的結論全線不變,敏感臉選 EltaMD,戶外活動日選 La Roche-Posay,CP 值掛帥就 Beauty of Joseon。每兩小時補一次,耳朵不要漏掉。

en.commentary: We are deep into peak sun season now, which is exactly when the daily-wear test matters most, so I am holding firm on a lineup built around the sunscreens people actually reapply. The EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 stays my number one because it is the formula sensitive and breakout-prone skin tolerates best while still wearing beautifully under makeup, and lab testing has confirmed it free of benzene contamination. That reassurance counts a lot in 2026. The ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica holds second for its DNA-repair enzymes and elegant mineral finish, and the La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-In Milk SPF 60 stays third as my body and beach pick thanks to its high protection and strong water resistance. La Roche-Posay just expanded the Anthelios line with a weightless, serum-like UV Air, which tells me the brand is leaning hard into the no-feel finishes that drive summer sales. For face wear in heat and humidity, the Supergoop Unseen and Beauty of Joseon Daily Relief remain the two I reach for most, one for its invisible primer feel, the other for its unbeatable value. My advice for July is simple. Pick a sunscreen you will happily reapply every two hours, use more than you think you need, and let an SPF this proven do its job through the hottest stretch of the year.

zh-tw.commentary: 現在正是一年最曬的旺季，這種時候日常補擦的考驗最關鍵，所以我這次穩住整份榜單，全部圍繞著大家真的會補擦的那幾支。EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 還是我的第一名，敏感肌跟容易冒痘的膚質最受得了它，上妝前打底也服貼漂亮，而且實驗室檢測確認它沒有苯污染。這份安心在 2026 年真的很值錢。ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica 守住第二，靠的是 DNA 修復酵素跟細緻的物理防曬膚感，La Roche-Posay Anthelios 融奶 SPF 60 維持第三，是我的身體跟海邊之選，防護高又抗水。La Roche-Posay 剛把 Anthelios 系列擴充了一支輕到像精華的 UV Air，這告訴我品牌正大力押注夏天熱賣的無感膚感。臉部在悶熱潮濕的天氣，Supergoop Unseen 跟 Beauty of Joseon 日常舒緩還是我最常拿的兩支，一支隱形妝前感，一支價格無敵。七月我的建議很簡單。挑一支你願意每兩小時開心補擦的防曬，用量比你想的還要多，然後讓這種驗證過的 SPF 陪你撐過全年最熱的這段。

highlights.body: 敏感肌跟易痘肌最受得了它，上妝服貼，實驗室也確認無苯污染，這讓它守住第一。

en.commentary: The EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 keeps first place through peak summer because it does the hardest job in this category the best. Its niacinamide-heavy formula calms acne, rosacea and hyperpigmentation while it protects, so it treats skin as it shields it. The texture feels like a high-end serum, absorbs fast and leaves a matte finish that sits cleanly under makeup, which is why acne-prone readers keep coming back to it. The ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica SPF 50 holds second as my protection-forward daily pick, with a light mineral feel and DNA repair enzymes that appeal to prevention-minded users. The La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-in Milk SPF 60 stays third and remains the one I hand anyone with an active, sweaty lifestyle. Its 2026 lineup leans on the Mexoryl 400 filter, which targets the ultra-long UVA rays from 380 to 400 nanometers that drive most photoaging, and its water resistance is the best up here. The Supergoop Unseen at fourth is still the invisible primer-style finish champion, and the Beauty of Joseon Daily Relief holds fifth as the value darling with a gorgeous glow. Down the list, CeraVe Hydrating Mineral stays the gentle drugstore staple. Nothing changed the order this week, so I copy the rankings forward with confidence heading into peak UV season.

highlights.body: A niacinamide-heavy formula calms acne and redness while it shields skin. The serum-like matte finish keeps it first for acne-prone faces.

highlights.body: The 2026 Mexoryl 400 filter targets ultra-long UVA and its water resistance is the best up here. It is my pick for active, sweaty days.

highlights.body: A primer-like, weightless feel keeps it fourth for makeup wearers. It disappears on skin while grippng foundation cleanly.

zh-tw.commentary: EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 一路守到盛夏第一，因為這品類最難的工作它做得最好。高濃度菸鹼醯胺的配方一邊防曬一邊安撫痘痘、酒糟跟色素沉澱，防護的同時也在照顧膚況。質地像高級精華液，吸收超快，收成霧面，上妝也服貼，這也是為什麼易長痘的讀者一直回頭買它。ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica SPF 50 守第二，是我防護優先的日常首選，礦物質感輕盈，還有 DNA 修復酵素，很對注重預防的人的胃口。La Roche-Posay Anthelios 融乳 SPF 60 續坐第三，是我給生活活躍、容易流汗的人的那一支。它的 2026 陣容主打 Mexoryl 400 濾劑，專打 380 到 400 奈米的超長波 UVA，也就是造成大部分光老化的元兇，抗水性也是這裡最好的。排第四的 Supergoop Unseen 依舊是隱形妝前感的冠軍，Beauty of Joseon 每日舒緩守第五，是那種價格親民又帶漂亮光澤的 CP 值寵兒。往下走，CeraVe 保濕礦物防曬還是溫和的開架常備款。這週順序沒變，我就放心把排名沿用下來，迎接紫外線最強的季節。

highlights.title: EltaMD UV Clear 邊防曬邊護膚
highlights.body: 高濃度菸鹼醯胺一邊安撫痘痘泛紅一邊防護。精華般的霧面收尾，讓它為易長痘膚質守住第一。

highlights.body: 2026 的 Mexoryl 400 濾劑專打超長波 UVA，抗水性也是這裡最好的。活躍流汗的日子我就選它。

en.commentary: Peak summer is exactly when a sunscreen earns its ranking, and after another week of daily wear I am keeping EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 at the top. It sits invisibly under makeup, calms reactive skin with its niacinamide base, and I still reach for it first every single morning. ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica holds second because its DNA repair enzymes and dry-touch mineral finish give it a preventive edge that dermatologists keep citing in this year's lab-tested roundups. La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-in Milk stays my beach and pool pick, with SPF 60 water resistance that survives real sweat and reapplication. The new 2026 launches making headlines, SkinCeuticals Future Mineral and Tatcha's milky SPF, are impressive on paper, and I am testing them now, so they may enter this list once I trust their wear over full days. For value, Beauty of Joseon Daily Relief remains a genuine steal at drugstore pricing with a finish that punches far above its cost. Supergoop Unseen keeps its spot as the smoothest primer-style base I know. My advice this week stays simple: pick the SPF you will actually reapply every two hours, because the best formula is the one that ends up back on your skin at lunch.

zh-tw.commentary: 盛夏正是防曬乳見真章的時候，連續戴了一週下來，我還是把 EltaMD UV Clear SPF 46 放在第一。它上妝幾乎隱形，菸鹼醯胺配方能安撫容易泛紅的敏感肌，每天早上我第一個伸手拿的就是它，這點很誠實。第二名依舊是 ISDIN Eryfotona Actinica，它的 DNA 修復酵素加上乾爽礦物質觸感，讓它多了一層預防老化的價值，今年好幾份實驗室評測都一直提到它。要去海邊或泳池，我固定帶 La Roche-Posay 安得利防曬乳，SPF 60 的抗水力在真的流汗、真的補擦的情況下撐得住。今年 2026 上市、被媒體點名的新品像 SkinCeuticals Future Mineral 和 Tatcha 的乳感防曬，紙面上很亮眼，我正在實測，等我確認整天的持妝表現，它們就有機會擠進榜單。講到 CP 值，Beauty of Joseon Daily Relief 用開架價位給你遠超價格的膚觸，真的划算。Supergoop Unseen 則穩坐我心中最滑順的妝前打底。這週的建議很簡單：選一支你真的願意每兩小時補擦的防曬，因為最好的配方，就是中午還會被你拿出來補在臉上的那一支。
